title: isp-confound-toolkit: confound-aware diagnostics for foundation-model in-silico perturbation predictions
description: A confound-diagnostic toolkit for judging when to trust foundation-model in-silico perturbation predictions, with Geneformer as a worked cautionary case. Provides path-D (a machine-precision re-implementation of the per-cell knockout response, validated against the official InSilicoPerturber to Pearson r = 1.000000), a universal-responsiveness control, a tokenization-coverage gate, a library-size contamination check, and a de-circularization matrix.
